real_questions.text: Map your counterparty web across the financial system — which banks, which private credit funds, which sponsors, and where do the correlated exposures sit?

real_questions: How large is your currency mismatch, and how is it hedged?

strong_answer_markers.text: Can map the counterparty web on request — banks, funds, sponsors — and identifies where correlated exposures concentrate.

agency_intel.text: Renewed focus on interconnectivity risk: deep ties between private credit funds and traditional financial institutions could heighten contagion in a downturn. Interconnectivity itself can be framed as a credit negative — expect questions on exposure to banks and across different types of financial institutions.

agency_intel: For insurers with large currency mismatches (an Asia-Pacific focus): FX swings are a live risk — expect questions on hedging and the size of the mismatch.
